channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ali Brunson Reveals the Simple Reason She Rarely Brings Daughter to Jalen Brunson’s Basketball Games (Exclusive)
item.description: The fitness program founder and New York Knicks captain welcomed their first child, daughter Jordyn, in July 2024

item.title: The True Story Behind JFK. Jr and Carolyn Bessette's Infamous Fight in a New York City Park
item.description: Episode 5 of 'Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. and Carolyn Bessette' includes a major — and perhaps familiar — fight between the leads

item.title: Who Is F1 Driver Nico Hulkenberg's Wife? All About Egle Hulkenberg
item.description: Formula 1 driver Nico Hulkenberg has been married to his wife, Egle, since 2021

item.title: Travis Kelce Gives His Must-Try Dating Advice 2 Years After He First Stepped Out with Taylor Swift
item.description: Travis and his brother Jason Kelce discussed their tips for asking a girl out during a special hotline episode of their 'New Heights' podcast

item.title: All About Lewis Hamilton's 3 Siblings (Including Another Race Car Driver!)
item.description: Lewis Hamilton’s brother, Nicolas, became the first disabled athlete to compete in the British Touring Car Championship in 2015

item.title: Rihanna Shares New Video of Her in Studio, Sparks New Music Buzz
item.description: Rihanna is doing nothing but work, work, work, work, work ... sharing a new video from inside the studio -- and fans are hoping it’s a sign fresh tune...

item.title: Benny Blanco Defends Viral Filthy Feet, Bares His Sole on 'Kimmel'
item.description: Benny Blanco is well aware his feet have gone viral after a recent podcast taping showed his bare tootsies were absolutely filthy ... but he says he's...

item.title: '1000-lb Sisters' Star Amy Undergoes Surgery to Correct Lazy Eye, on Video
item.description: "1000-lb Sisters" star Amy Slaton had a surgery that had nothing to do with her weight ... instead, it was all about her vision. TMZ obtained an exclu...

item.title: 'Grey's Anatomy' Pays Tribute to Eric Dane in Latest Episode
item.description: Eric Dane was celebrated Thursday evening by the TV show that launched his acting career -- "Grey's Anatomy" -- and it was picture-perfect! Here's wha...

item.title: Pink Could Take Over 'Kelly Clarkson Show,' According to New Report
item.description: Pink is being eyed to take over Kelly Clarkson's spot on her NBC talk show, according to a new report. The "American Idol" alum is closing out "The Ke...
